response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, but their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Python alternatives like Dlang) rather than the required C++ on Windows platform for capital markets/fixed income systems. While they have some C/C++ experience, it is limited and not recent enough to meet the mid-senior level C++ requirement for this role. Domain expertise in financial services is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and problem-solving skills
Experience with SQL and database management
Proven ability to work across multiple tech stacks and languages
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of strong C++ development experience on Windows platform
No clear domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
Dominant experience in non-C++ ecosystems (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang) rather than C++
